Body.Content:
Shared display mode in Teams is now available in government DOD environments, enabling more seamless and private meeting hosting from your PC. Additionally, peripheral detection for bring-your-own-device spaces is available for inventory management and reporting through the Pro Management portal.

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Teams shared display mode and peripheral detection available for DoD environments
